summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one lightly anchors the Cleveland tour to the prior chapter's late-May timeline, and one carries Simone's promised Tuesday follow-up into the chapter exit so the handoff toward the next chapter lands more cleanly.
edits: Added 'earlier that week' to Layla's booking sentence at the opening to clarify the transition into the tour.
Added 'Tuesday was on the calendar' to the final paragraph to reinforce the immediate post-Detroit handoff into Simone's next work session.
